dialogueChunks.intro: The evidence was reviewed for hours. When the verdict came, the guilty party's name was struck from every register. Decades of reputation, gone in an afternoon.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The wrongly accused have been formally cleared. {target_npc} says one of them wept when they heard. They'd been living under that shadow for years. {quest_ally} is overseeing restitution.
dialogueChunks.outro: Finding the truth cost the person who started this everything they believed about their mentor, {player_name}. But it gave innocent people their names back.

playerResponses.text: The whistleblower showed more integrity than the guilty ever did.
Years of false disgrace. Make sure they're truly made whole.

dialogueChunks.intro: The evidence was undeniable. The details at the site told a story completely different from the one carved into the memorial.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The false hero was removed from their position. The memorial is being recarved with the names of the actual defenders. {target_npc} found a survivor who confirmed everything. {quest_ally} says the settlement is in shock, but it's the clean kind: the kind that comes before honest rebuilding.
dialogueChunks.outro: It's painful to learn your hero was a fraud, {player_name}. But the real heroes deserve their names on the stone. You made sure the right story gets told.

playerResponses.text: The real defenders waited a long time for their due. Better late than never.
A settlement that can face its own lies is stronger for it.
Watch for the next person who tells you what you want to hear.

dialogueChunks.intro: The administrator was caught at the border with packed wagons and a new identity. The full records are now in the hands of the authorities.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The accounting is devastating. Over years, enough resources to help every displaced family were diverted to personal luxury. {target_npc} says the recovered assets will be redistributed. {quest_ally} is coordinating distribution to where the funds were originally promised.
dialogueChunks.outro: The most trusted person in the settlement turned out to be its worst predator, {player_name}. The {quest_stakes} will finally receive what was promised. It doesn't undo the suffering, but it's the closest thing to justice.

playerResponses.text: Justice delayed is painful, but it still matters. Well done.
Build oversight into the next fund. Trust alone isn't enough.
